description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
At 1:54pm, a WeRide vehicle (Car 1) was stopped on Embarcadero St left turning lane to Howard St. As our vehicle (Car 1) was stopped 
for red traffic light, the toyota suv (Car 2) approaching from behind collided with our vehicle (Car 1). Both parties pulled over both 
involved vehicles and cooperated to exchange information. The damage sustained to the WeRide vehicle (Car 1) and toyota suv (Car 2) are 
minor.
Print
Clear Form
